name: 5 ML  Flurbiprofen Eye Drops IP

The product is a result of years of research and development and is formulated as per the highest industry standards. The eye drops are to be used as directed by a physician and can provide relief from various eye-related discomforts. The dosage guidelines and form of the product make it easy to use, and it can be stored in a dry place for longer shelf life.
